scripts.build: rimraf dist wasm-build && npm run wasm:build:release && tsc
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run lint:test && npm test && npm run build
scripts.wasm:base:build:debug: mkdirp wasm-build/base-debug && em++ src-cpp/common.cpp src-cpp/base.cpp src-cpp/SGP4.cpp src-cpp/debug.cpp --emit-tsd index.d.ts -g -msimd128 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_malloc,_free,___lsan_do_recoverable_leak_check -sMODULARIZE -sEXPORT_ES6 -sEXPORT_NAME="Module" -o wasm-build/base-debug/index.js -Rpass=loop-vectorize -Rpass-missed=loop-vectorize -Rpass-analysis=loop-vectorize -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=UTF8ToString,stringToUTF8,lengthBytesUTF8,HEAP8,HEAPF64 -sEXIT_RUNTIME=1 -fsanitize=leak,address
scripts.wasm:base:build:release: mkdirp wasm-build/base-release && em++ src-cpp/common.cpp src-cpp/base.cpp src-cpp/SGP4.cpp --emit-tsd index.d.ts -O3 -msimd128 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_malloc,_free -sMODULARIZE -sEXPORT_ES6 -sEXPORT_NAME="Module" -sSINGLE_FILE -o wasm-build/base-release/index.js -Rpass=loop-vectorize -Rpass-missed=loop-vectorize -Rpass-analysis=loop-vectorize -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=UTF8ToString,stringToUTF8,lengthBytesUTF8,HEAP8,HEAPF64 -sEXIT_RUNTIME=1
scripts.wasm:pthreads:build:debug: mkdirp wasm-build/pthreads-debug && em++ src-cpp/common.cpp src-cpp/pthreads.cpp src-cpp/SGP4.cpp src-cpp/debug.cpp -pthread -sASYNCIFY=1 -sPTHREAD_POOL_SIZE_STRICT=0 --emit-tsd index.d.ts -g -msimd128 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_malloc,_free,___lsan_do_recoverable_leak_check -sMODULARIZE -sEXPORT_ES6 -sEXPORT_NAME="Module" -o wasm-build/pthreads-debug/index.js -Rpass=loop-vectorize -Rpass-missed=loop-vectorize -Rpass-analysis=loop-vectorize -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=UTF8ToString,stringToUTF8,lengthBytesUTF8,ccall,cwrap,HEAP8,HEAPF64 -sEXIT_RUNTIME=1 -fsanitize=leak,address
scripts.wasm:pthreads:build:release: mkdirp wasm-build/pthreads-release && em++ src-cpp/common.cpp src-cpp/pthreads.cpp src-cpp/SGP4.cpp -pthread -sASYNCIFY=1 -sPTHREAD_POOL_SIZE_STRICT=0 --emit-tsd index.d.ts -O3 -msimd128 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_malloc,_free -sMODULARIZE -sEXPORT_ES6 -sEXPORT_NAME="Module" -sSINGLE_FILE -o wasm-build/pthreads-release/index.js -Rpass=loop-vectorize -Rpass-missed=loop-vectorize -Rpass-analysis=loop-vectorize -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=UTF8ToString,stringToUTF8,lengthBytesUTF8,ccall,cwrap,HEAP8,HEAPF64 -sEXIT_RUNTIME=1
scripts.wasm:build: npm run wasm:base:build:debug && npm run wasm:base:build:release && npm run wasm:pthreads:build:debug && npm run wasm:pthreads:build:release
scripts.wasm:build:release: npm run wasm:base:build:release && npm run wasm:pthreads:build:release
